summary: Regression pass after eslint-disable comment-only changes to 5 useEffect hooks (AdminPanels.jsx Monitor/Audit/Outreach/PilotLeads + ThreatIntel loadReports). Login OK, all Governance sub-tabs and Threat Intel render and fetch data correctly. Zero console errors and zero React warnings (dependency/key/exhaustive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified via Playwright at /dashboard using AUTHENTICATE button. Governance nav (nav-admin) then sub-tabs gov-tab-monitoring/audit/outreach/pilot all load data. Monitoring cards show DB Connected, Scheduler Running, tenants/users/leads counts and auto-refresh timestamp. Audit table renders and admin.set_role filter reload works. Outreach template dropdown has 5 options, history table shows 12 sent emails. Pilot Leads shows Refresh + Export CSV. Threat Intel nav-threat renders High-Ticket Targets (30 items) with prior reports fetched on mount. No behavior regression from the eslint-disable annotations.
rca of the issue: N/A — comment-only change verified as safe.
